title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: Google Cloud experts argue that AI-native databases are essential for powering intelligent agents with high-fidelity, interconnected context. The session covers AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, multimodal queries, graph RAG, and open standards like Model Context Protocol and agentic IDEs as key enablers for agent deployment.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech makes the case that AI-native databases supply intelligent agents with high-fidelity, interconnected context. The session walks through AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, multimodal queries, and graph retrieval-augmented generation as ways to ground agent behavior in enterprise data. It also positions open standards, specifically the Model Context Protocol, and agentic IDEs as key enablers for deploying agents.
